data.description: This is an immobile, shimmering barrier that springs into existence around you. The barrier has a 10-foot radius and lasts for the duration of the spell. Any spell of 5th level or lower cast from outside the barrier cannot affect creatures, objects, or any other targets inside the barrier.
Your size is determined by your size category and any effects that change it. Your space increases or decreases accordingly, and your movement speed might be changed.

A shimmering pattern of light and shadow materializes in an area you choose within range. Each creature in a 20-foot-radius, 40-foot-diameter sphere centered on a point you can see must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be charmed by you for the duration. While charmed, a target is incapacitated and friendly to you, but it can take reactions only to cast the Friends spell.
A globe of shimmering force springs into existence around you, extending 10 feet in every direction.
